mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in PAYEMS signals expanding labor income and resilient aggregate demand, raising expected corporate revenues and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
fact:PAYEMS latest available value was 155073 thousand as of t-1mo
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with continued job creation
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth has a nonpositive 20-day return coefficient in walk-forward tests and positive-return frequency is not above baseline in at least 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.25%, the higher policy-rate level raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.25% after being below that level within the prior 6 months
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 4.33 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 25 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS combined with slowing CPIAUCSL indicates real consumption strength without incremental inflation pressure, improving earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month change > 0 and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change below its prior 6-month annualized change
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:RSAFS latest available value was 696982 as of t-1mo
fact:CPIAUCSL latest available value was 300.536 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal has lower mean 20-day returns than periods with rising RSAFS and accelerating CPIAUCSL, or if its walk-forward hit rate is below 50% over two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A negative break in INDPRO over 3 months signals weakening goods-sector output and margin pressure, causing downward earnings revisions and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO latest available value was 102.9525 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO contractions are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the conditional return mean is not statistically below zero at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A large decline in HOUST signals falling residential investment and weaker rate-sensitive demand, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest available value was 1382 thousand units as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines beyond the trigger are not associated with lower subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns than nontrigger periods in at least 70% of walk-forward evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals that labor-market slack is emerging and recession risk is increasing, lowering expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE latest available value was 3.4 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: transition from tight labor market to slowdown
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases do not precede negative average 60-day returns, or if drawdown incidence after triggers is not higher than unconditional drawdown incidence.

mechanism_narrative: High FEDFUNDS combined with accelerating CPIAUCSL signals that policy remains behind inflation, forcing hawkish repricing of rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4% and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change exceeds its prior 6-month annualized change
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 4.33 as of t-1mo
fact:CPIAUCSL latest available value was 300.536 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term between high FEDFUNDS and accelerating CPIAUCSL has a nonnegative coefficient for 5-day returns in walk-forward regressions or if triggered hit rate for negative returns is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in both INDPRO and GDPC1 signals broad real activity expansion across monthly production and quarterly output, improving earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change > 0 and GDPC1 latest quarter-over-quarter change > 0
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
series:GDPC1
fact:INDPRO latest available value was 102.9525 as of t-1mo
fact:GDPC1 latest available value was 20198.091 as of t-4mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive INDPRO and GDPC1 signal produces average 5-day returns below the unconditional average or if its walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 for three consecutive years.
